title: NavigationFlow
description: An ordered sequence of FlowSteps that together realize a multi-step user process — such as a checkout wizard, onboarding tour, or multi-page form — by linking discrete routes into a directed path with defined entry and exit points. A NavigationFlow is the top-level container for a user journey: it groups FlowSteps, imposes traversal order, and provides the orchestration context that connects navigation structure to a business process outcome.
